title: Mergen adapter manifest
description: A per-host capability manifest (core/adapters/<host>.json). It declares, as data, exactly what a render target can and cannot do, so a renderer never claims a capability the host lacks and the capability matrix is generated from these manifests rather than hand-maintained. Each capability is a boolean and the full vocabulary is required, so a host states a yes or a no for every capability and none is left ambiguous. additionalProperties is false at every level so a manifest cannot smuggle an undeclared capability a reader might misinterpret. The runtime that enforces this is scripts/adapter_sdk.py (mergen adapter validate).

host.description: the host name, which must equal the manifest file stem under core/adapters/

title.description: a human-readable title for the host shown in the generated capability matrix

note.description: an honest one-line statement of what the host does and does not port

slash_commands.description: the host exposes mergen commands as invocable slash commands

command_suite.description: the host carries the full mergen command suite (verify, rollup, go, lean, debt, govern)

lifecycle_hooks.description: the host runs mergen lifecycle hooks at tool and session events

settings_registration.description: the host registers mergen into its own settings file

project_bootstrap.description: the host bootstraps a per-project mergen scaffold

workflow_orchestration.description: the host runs the Workflow-orchestrated SDD engine

verify_gate.description: the host enforces the verification gate before work is accepted

passive_rules.description: the host carries the portable lazy-ladder minimalism discipline as a passive rule file
